pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT (val_bpb 1.1253)

output.summary: 11-layer model couples Parallel Muon banking, LeakyReLU² MLP3x, and legal score-first TTT SGD fine-tuning under inference-mode token scoring.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT trains on validation chunks via SGD after sliding-window scoring before weight updates.
techniques: Parallel Muon banking with batched Newton-Schulz
LeakyReLU² MLP3x with gated attention/U-Net skips
